scripts.build: npm run build -w @devboard/api && npm run build -w @devboard/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @devboard/api && npm run lint -w @devboard/web
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w @devboard/api && npm run lint:fix -w @devboard/web
scripts.format: npm run format -w @devboard/api && npm run format -w @devboard/web
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check -w @devboard/api && npm run format:check -w @devboard/web
